@hazeljs/guardrails.description: Optional guardrails for tool input/output validation

@hazeljs/agent.description: Required when using @hazeljs/agent ToolRegistry. Not needed for custom IToolRegistry implementations.

@hazeljs/kafka.description: Required for Kafka async processing - npm install @hazeljs/kafka

ioredis.description: Required for Redis context store - npm install ioredis

viber-bot.description: Required for Viber channel - npm install viber-bot

ioredis.description: Required for Redis connection. BullMQ uses ioredis for Redis connectivity.
